description: A transparent, minimal, and hackable agent framework. ~300 lines of readable code. Full control, no magic.
This python program allows you to use Claude Code with Google's Gemini models.

Chat Relay is a system that allows Cline/RooCode to communicate with web-based AI chat interfaces (like Gemini, AI Studio, ChatGPT, and Claude) through an OpenAI-compatible API. This enables using models that may not have public APIs through their web interfaces.
